title: ProMeat
overview: ProMeat is an IIT Bombay–incubated startup focused on creating plant-based meat alternatives for the Indian market. The brand approached LogicNodes to redesign their website with a clean, modern, and global look—similar to global brands like Impossible Foods—while ensuring a seamless, easy-to-manage backend for their non-technical team.
challenges: Website lacked clarity in design and brand storytelling
No consistent use of brand colours or premium identity
Product updates required contacting a developer each time
Backend was complex and not suitable for non-technical founders
Website structure was not scalable for upcoming product launches
goals: A premium, international-quality website aligned with their brand
A simple backend to upload/edit products, images, and content
A scalable structure to support expansion into multiple product categories
Improved responsiveness, performance, and SEO
A design that increases trust and engagement

solution_categories.title: Design & Brand Identity
items: Completely redesigned the UI with clean layouts and premium visual language
Integrated brand colours consistently across the website
Built a storytelling-focused section for mission, ingredients, and benefits

solution_categories.title: Development & Scalability
items: Developed a custom backend/admin panel for easy management
Enabled product, pricing, image, and content updates—no developer needed
Built scalable categories for future product expansion

solution_categories.title: Performance & Optimization
items: Improved page speed and reduced layout shift
Implemented SEO-friendly structure and metadata
Ensured mobile-first responsiveness

solution_categories.title: Ease of Use
items: Admin panel designed for non-technical teams
Intuitive UI making updates simple and stress-free

features: Custom Admin Panel for product & content management
Scalable product module for future launches
results: Website now reflects international plant-based brand standards
Clear, premium, and consistent brand identity
Client can manage the entire website independently
Faster updates → reduced operational dependency
Increased clarity and engagement from customers
Strong digital presence supporting investor & customer trust

title: GaavBazaar.com
overview: GaavBazaar is a riidl-incubated startup dedicated to empowering rural artisans by taking handcrafted village products directly to online customers. They partnered with LogicNodes to build a modern, clean, and culturally rooted e-commerce platform that could communicate their mission while remaining simple enough for a non-technical team to operate.
challenges: Website failed to express the village-to-customer story
Weak visual storytelling for artisans and handcrafted products
Product categories were confusing, leading to poor navigation
Team struggled to update products, stock, and prices
No structured analytics or scalable e-commerce framework
goals: A modern yet culturally authentic design
Clear storytelling around rural artisans and handcrafted goods
Easy-to-manage product and order system
Streamlined categories for smoother shopping
Scalable structure for future collections and artisans
Improved SEO and customer browsing experience

solution_categories.title: Culturally Rooted UI Design
items: Blended modern e-commerce layouts with rural-inspired visuals
Highlighted artisans, village craftsmanship, and product stories
Built an emotional brand experience that reflects authenticity

solution_categories.title: Improved Navigation & Structure
items: Created clear, intuitive product categories
Structured collections for handcrafted goods, village products, and special editions

solution_categories.title: Clean & Simple Admin Panel
items: Enabled easy product, image, price, and stock management
Provided order processing and basic analytics tools
Designed specifically for non-technical teams

solution_categories.title: Performance & SEO Enhancements
items: Optimized SEO structure to boost online visibility
Improved page loading, browsing flow, and user experience

features: Simplified admin panel for daily operations
Clear storytelling around artisans and handmade value
Scalable structure for new products, artisans, and categories
results: Strong digital identity showcasing rural artisans and handcrafted culture
Client can manage the entire e-commerce platform independently
Enhanced customer trust and improved user experience
Smoother browsing → higher engagement and better conversions
Scalable platform supporting GaavBazaar’s vision to uplift village entrepreneurs

title: Sajeev Krushi
overview: Sajeev Krushi was built on a powerful mission: transforming organic waste into sustainable value through vermiculture. Inspired by Masanobu Fukuoka’s “One-Straw Revolution,” the founder aimed to create a system where biodegradable waste becomes high-quality compost, empowering farmers and restoring soil health.
challenges: Lack of digital presence to express the powerful story of “Garbage to Green”
No scalable platform to manage vermiculture projects and compost production
Farmers did not have easy access to high-quality organic fertilisers
Difficulty in training people on vermiculture and waste management
No structured backend to track production, waste inputs, or operational efficiency
Trust-building and brand positioning challenges in the organic farming ecosystem
goals: A strong brand narrative that communicates sustainability and impact
A clean, nature-inspired website showcasing their mission, products, and services
A simple backend system to manage vermiculture units, compost production, and product listings
Tools to track waste input, worm culture growth, and production analytics
Educational sections to guide farmers and aspiring entrepreneurs
A credible digital identity that builds trust and supports expansion

solution_categories.title: Brand Storytelling & Identity
items: Created the brand narrative “Garbage to Green”
Positioned Sajeev Krushi as a blend of waste-management innovation + organic agriculture
Highlighted founder expertise and mission-driven impact

solution_categories.title: UI/UX & Website Design
items: Designed a clean, green-themed website reflecting nature, growth, and sustainability
Structured information around vermiculture services, compost products, training programs, and environmental impact

solution_categories.title: Operations & Admin System
items: Built an admin panel to manage vermiculture project tracking, compost monitoring, and order flow
Simplified workflow for non-technical team members like farmers and managers

solution_categories.title: Waste-to-Value Project Tools
items: Added tools to track waste input and worm culture growth
Enabled annual production analytics to identify efficient projects

features: Strong brand narrative around sustainable waste conversion
Simplified admin panel for project and product management
Clear storytelling that builds trust and credibility
results: Reduced urban and rural biodegradable waste by converting it into compost
Enabled farmers to generate income and restore soil health
Implemented ~20 commercial vermicompost projects
Scalable digital tools allow monitoring of each unit
Promoted organic farming and circular waste systems

title: Cherries & Peaches
overview: Cherries & Peaches is an influencer-driven lifestyle brand built around a vibrant personality, curated aesthetics, and strong visual storytelling. We transformed their social-media profile into a professional, standalone digital identity ready for merch, collaborations, and content monetization.
challenges: Online identity existed mostly on social media, not as a professional brand
No structured platform to showcase content, collaborations, or merch
Needed a web presence that matched their vibrancy and aesthetic
Required an intuitive backend to update content effortlessly
goals: A digital-first identity that feels like a “brand,” not just a profile
A beautifully designed website matching their feminine, fruity aesthetic
Space to showcase lifestyle content, blogs, and collaborations
A simple admin panel to update posts and media independently
A mobile-first user experience for influencer audiences

solution_categories.title: Brand Identity & Storytelling
items: Designed a website rooted in the “Cherries & Peaches” aesthetic
Used soft pinks, peach tones, and cherry-inspired highlights
Created story-centric sections: About Me, mission, and personality showcase

solution_categories.title: Website Structure & Design
items: Built a clean, lightweight UI for lifestyle visuals
Created dedicated sections for Media, Blogs, and Merch
Ensured design matches personal brand tone — feminine and expressive

solution_categories.title: Admin Panel for Independence
items: Developed a simple backend for updating blogs and collaborations
Enabled easy media uploads and announcement management

features: Sections for content, merch, collaborations, and contact
Easy-to-use admin panel for independent updates
Aesthetic matching the influencer’s brand identity
results: Transitioned from a social handle to a complete lifestyle brand
Increased credibility for potential brand partners and sponsors
Self-sufficient content management system
Future-ready foundation for Merch and Digital Products

title: IILOS
overview: IILOS was founded to bridge the gap between logistics theory and real-world industry practices. We built a strong educational framework, established a premium digital presence, and designed a model that connects students with industry-led learning.
challenges: Academic programs were outdated and disconnected from operations
Lack of platforms integrating students and logistics companies
Need for a blended model combining education + industry partnerships
goals: An industry-aligned curriculum across logistics domains
A premium online presence as a credible educational institute
Partnerships with logistics companies for internships and recruitment
A blended learning infrastructure combining online/offline methods

solution_categories.title: Curriculum Development & Strategy
items: Co-designed modules in Supply Chain, Transportation, and Warehouse management
Ensured all modules were industry-aligned and application-oriented

solution_categories.title: Digital Presence & Branding
items: Designed a professional institute website (iilos.org)
Focused on “Industry + Knowledge + Innovation” messaging
Structured content for students, professionals, and corporates

solution_categories.title: Industry Partnerships & Learning
items: Facilitated collaborations with logistics companies for internships
Built a blended-learning system and mentorship network

features: Professional institute website with a strong identity
results: Students receive practical, application-based learning exposure
Companies view IILOS as a reliable partner for recruitment
Scalable growth model into new geographies
Established along-term community of logistics professionals

title: Outline Next
overview: Outline Next is a full-service marketing agency helping brands turn ideas into measurable impact. We built a website that acts as a narrative and conversion engine — showcasing their strategy, creative execution, and results.
challenges: Difficult to differentiate in a crowded marketing agency landscape
Needed to clearly show strategic thinking + creative execution
Lack of a central place for case studies and proof of expertise
Needed a backend to manage services and portfolio independently
goals: A modern, premium agency website aligned with their brand
Strong positioning: strategy + creativity + results
Dedicated pages for services, case studies, and process
Conversion-optimized layout with lead-generation CTAs

solution_categories.title: Brand Storytelling & Web Design
items: Designed a clean, modern interface with impact-focused storytelling
Framed services as narratives: pain points → strategy → outcomes

solution_categories.title: Service-First Architecture
items: Created distinct pages for Strategy, Creative, and Growth
Ensured each page communicates outcomes over simple service lists

solution_categories.title: Conversion-Driven Design
items: Integrated strong CTAs like “Book a Strategy Call” and “See Our Work”
Strategically placed lead-capture forms for maximum conversions

results: Website now effectively communicates their strategic identity
Showcasing process and expertise increases client trust
Converted website traffic into actual project leads
Team can easily add new content independently

title: Alkem Laboratories
overview: Alkem Laboratories needed a centralized internal portal for 10,000+ employees. We delivered a production-ready, enterprise-level frontend in record time (3 weeks), following strict UI guidelines and complex backend workflows.
challenges: Communication happened through scattered emails and Google Forms
Extremely tight 3-week timeline for a full enterprise portal
Mandatory pixel precision and corporate guideline alignment
Need for clean API mapping and backend collaboration
goals: A centralized system for employees to explore and register for events
Production-ready frontend delivered under heavy time pressure
Seamless backend integration and smooth data flow
Admin-friendly structure for event managers

solution_categories.title: Enterprise Frontend in 3 Weeks
items: Delivered pixel-perfect screens following Alkem’s brand standards
Built a scalable architecture for future feature expansion
Optimized for high-performance and heavy traffic

solution_categories.title: User-Friendly Event Flow
items: Enabled instance event discovery and registration
Built tracking systems for past and upcoming employee activities

solution_categories.title: API Collaboration
items: Mapped all API endpoints and provided integration-ready structures
Shared continuous feedback for backend improvements

features: Easy event discovery and registration flow
Admin portal for event creation and tracking
results: Complete delivery within the strict 3-week deadline
Higher employee engagement through a central portal
Eliminated manual work (emails/spreadsheets) for HR teams
Seamless backend-to-frontend workflow integration
Future-proof UI ready for analytics and role-based access

title: Safari Sutra
overview: Safari Sutra is a luxury safari brand offering curated journeys across India's wildlife destinations. We built an experiential platform that guides users through exploration, wildlife, and luxury travel with immersive storytelling.
challenges: Brand presence didn’t reflect the premium nature of offerings
Difficult user journey for destination exploration
Need for an editorial-style design that elevated photography
goals: High-end visual storytelling and travel quality
Strong brand identity reflecting luxury and wilderness
A structured system for itineraries and destination details
Clean enquiry flow for high-conversion lead generation

solution_categories.title: Premium UI/UX Design
items: Used earthy tones and large hero imagery for an immersive feel
Editorial-style layouts with clean typography for luxury appeal

solution_categories.title: Experience-Driven Structure
items: Structured destination highlights and experience-based browsing
Built a visual framework for itinerary storytelling

solution_categories.title: frontend Performance & Enquiry
items: Optimized image loading and smooth frontend transitions
Implemented a high-conversion enquiry flow for travel bookings

results: Digital positioning now matches real-world luxury quality
Increased user time-on-site exploring destinations

Established Safari Sutra as a high-trust travel brand
